TL* THE CONTACT OWNS A 2020 CAN-AM RYKER. THE CONTACT STATED THAT WHILE DRIVING 20 MPH, HE HEARD AN ABNORMAL CLUNKING SOUND COMING FROM THE FRONT PASSENGER'S SIDE WHEEL. UPON INSPECTION, THE CONTACT DISCOVERED THE LUG NUT HOLDING THE WHEEL WAS BARELY TIGHTENED AND COULD BE LOOSEN

Can Am is shutting down while operating on highway. Defective fuel pump Shut down multiple times and at times loss of power

The contact owns a 2020 Can-Am Ryker. The contact stated that while making left turns at approximately 25 MPH, the rear wheel vibrated abnormally. There was no warning light illuminated. The vehicle was not diagnosed or repaired. The manufacturer was not notified of the failure.

narrative.headline: What 2020 Can-Am Ryker owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 16 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Steering (50% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
